description:
cloudstack_vpn_connection

Creates a site to site VPN connection.

argument_reference.name: customer_gateway_id
argument_reference.description: The Customer Gateway ID to connect. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: vpn_gateway_id
argument_reference.description: The VPN Gateway ID to connect. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: id
attributes_reference.description: The ID of the VPN Connection.
